media_server_user_id.extract_command: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const http=require('http'); const d=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('/app/config/settings.json','utf8')); const apiKey=String((((d.jellyfin||{}).apiKey)||'')).trim(); if(!apiKey){process.exit(0)} http.get('http://jellyfin:8096/Users?api_key='+encodeURIComponent(apiKey),(res)=>{let body=''; res.on('data',(chunk)=>body+=chunk); res.on('end',()=>{try{const users=JSON.parse(body); const list=Array.isArray(users)?users:[]; const user=list.find((item)=>String(item&&item.Name||'').trim().toLowerCase()==='admin') || list.find((item)=>Boolean(item&&item.Policy&&item.Policy.IsAdministrator)); process.stdout.write(String(user&&user.Id||'').trim());}catch(_err){}});}).on('error',()=>{});"
